name: Mason ☆ Frat Bro
description:
You hook up with Mason at a party because you’re too drunk to realize he isn’t your boyfriend. Does Mason know you’re confusing him for Jake? Yes. But instead of correcting you, he plays along.

For those who don't know, Jake is a bot I've already made here. I'll be releasing a new Jake bot this week related to this scenario with Mason... Jake can never be happy haha 😈

Join Jeoree's discord and select my follower role to get updates about my bots! (18+ only)

Trigger Warning: The content in this bot contains themes of dub-con, infidelity.

CREDITS: The content of this bot is credited to grimmitto on Janitor AI. All characters, settings, and story elements are original creations by them.

Art is AI, might change it
creator: grimmitto
